archetype: Electric & Neon / Jewel & Luxury Hybrid (Premium SaaS)

kanban_board.column: flex flex-col gap-4 h-full min-h-[500px] p-4 bg-slate-900/30 rounded-2xl border border-slate-800/50

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and lists. Center-align login card and empty states.

components.glass_card: bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl
components.role_badge: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.2)]
components.primary_button: w-full sm:w-auto bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/25
components.input_field: w-full bg-slate-950/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-slate-50 placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all
components.task_card: bg-slate-800/40 backdrop-blur-sm border border-slate-700/50 rounded-xl p-5 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing flex flex-col gap-3

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Use focus:ring-2 for keyboard navigation.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='login-button', data-testid='task-card-123', data-testid='kanban-column-pending'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the React application using Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Lucide React icons.
Do not use generic fonts for headings (avoid Inter/Roboto). Use the specified typography (Manrope / Plus Jakarta Sans).
Use @hello-pangea/dnd or dnd-kit for Kanban drag-and-drop functionality.
Implement the 'Glass Card' component exactly as specified using backdrop-blur-xl and border-white/10.
For the login screen background, use a pure CSS radial gradient over bg-slate-950 to create subtle indigo and emerald glowing orbs using absolute positioned divs with heavy blur.
Ensure the layout strictly follows the 'kanban_board' grid constraints.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all actionable items and drag zones.
